calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Brandon Tang, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY, a corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CATHERINE FINUCANE, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Clarence Gee Lee a nd Steve Good sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $38,658.04
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,913.65
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $513.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $42,084.69
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Continued To Nov-04-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Continued To May-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
